title: Arachnophobia Mode For Minecraft
description: A joke mod that adds the Arachnophobia Mode from the "Satisfactory" game to minecraft
body:
# arachnophobia-mode-for-minecraft

A Joke Mod that adds the Arachnophobia Mode from Satisfactory to minecraft
(this turns spiders into equally terrifying cats)

This mod requires [fabric-language-kotlin](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin) and
[cloth-config](https://curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cloth-config)

This can be used with [modmenu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)

## Images

![example cat image](https://i.imgur.com/qeKUgat.png)
